position_news.summary: Kotak Mahindra Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates |SUBJECT: General Updates

recent_announcements.summary: ESSARSHPNG: Essar Shipping Limited has informed that the Board of Directors of Essar Shipping Limited (the Company), at their Meeting held today i.e., on Saturday, July 4, 2026, has approved availing loan/s from Abhinand Ventures Private Limited and/or Niwas Residential & Commercial Properties Private Limited. |SUBJECT: Outcome of Board Meeting
